text.title: Kubernetes Security Hardening Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes Security Hardening` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: label-psa
step.action: Add pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce=restricted (start with warn if workloads not ready).

step.name: container-hardening
step.action: Set runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, drop ALL caps, allowPrivilegeEscalation false.

step.name: image-policy
step.action: Wire Kyverno / Gatekeeper policy requiring signed images.
